name: How long does it take to fully restore a home after severe storm damage?

mainEntity.name: How long does it take to fully restore a home after severe storm damage?

acceptedAnswer.text: Emergency mitigation to secure your property typically takes 24 to 72 hours, while full repairs can range from a few days for minor issues to several weeks or months for extensive damage like a complete roof replacement or mold remediation. The timeline depends on the severity of the storm damage, material availability, and labor capacity after major storms.
acceptedAnswer.description: Emergency mitigation takes 24-72 hours; full repairs can take days to months depending on damage severity.

description: Emergency mitigation takes 24-72 hours; full repairs can take days to months depending on damage severity.
